word: H3860 - לָהֵן - lâhên - law-hane' - For them

sections.paragraph:
Original: להן

Transliteration: lâhên

Phonetic: law-hane'

BDB Definition:

  1. therefore, on this account

Origin: from the prepositional prefix meaning to or for and H2005

TWOT entry: 1083

Part(s) of speech: Conjunction
